sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT, start_date DATE, end_date DATE);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, start_date, end_date) VALUES (1, DATE '2023-01-01', DATE '2023-03-01');
UPDATE test_dates SET end_date = DATE '2023-06-01' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT date_diff('month', start_date, end_date) AS month_diff FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1;
